node.statement: The hybrid classical-quantum algorithm of Childs, Johnston, Kiedrowski, Vempati, Yu (arXiv:2604.05098) for solving the neutron diffusion k-eigenvalue PDE can be decomposed into a complete set of quantum subroutines, each implementable in Sturm.jl's 4-primitive DSL (QBool, theta, phi, xor), with explicit identification of which subroutines Sturm.jl already provides and which must be built.
